raw.advertiser_name: 윈조이 포커 - 블랙잭, 바카라, 슬롯, 로우바둑이

hook.summary: A slot machine spin resulting in a jackpot win with a curiosity-inducing headline.
hook.visual_action: Slot reels spin and land on three 7s, triggering a jackpot animation with falling gold coins.

scene_flow: Initial slot spin with a hook headline asking for the secret to winning.
Reels land on a jackpot combination, triggering a celebratory coin animation.
Transition text asking the viewer if they are the next winner.
Final brand end card with logo and download call-to-action.
on_screen_text: 9 different symbols in a single spin awards the Free Game
audience_proxy: Adults interested in social casino games and the excitement of high-stakes gambling.
